meaning: n.玻利尼西亚(中太平洋群岛,意为 "多岛群岛",包括夏威夷群岛、萨摩亚群岛、汤加群岛核社会群岛等)
examples: Before the arrival of Europeans, the islands in the two largest cultural areas, Polynesia and Micronesia, together contained a population estimated at 700,000.
Polynesia agreed to teach Dr. Dolittle parrot language.
"Dogs talk with their ears, their noses, and their tails," Polynesia told him.
As he had predicted, she was carried by currents and wind to Polynesia 4, 300 miles away.
The 101-day trip was designed to prove that South Americans could have settled Polynesia in pre-Columbus times.
